rulings.Case Title: GEORGE LILLIE VS. CERTAINTEED CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant'S Joinder To J-M Manufacturing Company, Inc.'S Motion To Dismiss, Or In The Alternative, Motion To Continue Trial With Proof Of Service
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 13, 2014 in Department 503, Line 1. Defendant Grinnell LLC's joinder to J-M Manufacturing Company, Inc.'s motion to dismiss or, in the alternative, motion to continue trial is continued on the court's own motion to May 22, 2014. = (503/TLJ)
